data_description.api_key: Your Pstryk Energy API key for authentication

price_settings.title: Price Monitoring
price_settings.description: Configure how many hours of best and worst prices to track

data_description.buy_top: Hours with cheapest buy prices to highlight (1-24)
data_description.sell_top: Hours with highest sell prices to highlight (1-24)
data_description.buy_worst: Hours with most expensive buy prices to highlight (1-24)
data_description.sell_worst: Hours with lowest sell prices to highlight (1-24)

mqtt_settings.title: MQTT Bridge
mqtt_settings.description: Configure MQTT integration for external systems

data_description.mqtt_enabled: Publish prices to MQTT for external systems like EVCC
data_description.mqtt_topic_buy: MQTT topic where buy prices will be published
data_description.mqtt_topic_sell: MQTT topic where sell prices will be published

api_retry.title: API Reliability
api_retry.description: Configure retry behavior for API failures

data_description.retry_attempts: Number of times to retry failed API requests

error.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration not configured or not working. Please configure the MQTT integration in Home Assistant before enabling EVCC MQTT Bridge.

data_description.buy_top: How many cheapest buy prices to highlight (1-24 hours)
data_description.sell_top: How many highest sell prices to highlight (1-24 hours)
data_description.buy_worst: How many most expensive buy prices to highlight (1-24 hours)
data_description.sell_worst: How many lowest sell prices to highlight (1-24 hours)
data_description.mqtt_enabled: Enable publishing prices to MQTT for external systems like EVCC
data_description.mqtt_topic_buy: MQTT topic where buy prices will be published
data_description.mqtt_topic_sell: MQTT topic where sell prices will be published
data_description.mqtt_48h_mode: Publish 48 hours of prices (today + tomorrow) instead of just today
data_description.retry_attempts: How many times to retry API requests on failure
data_description.retry_delay: Wait time between API retry attempts
data_description.json_sensor_enabled: Adds Pstryk Json Buy/Sell sensors with standardized prices_today, prices_tomorrow and prices attributes (compatible with EV Smart Charging, cheapest-energy-hours etc.)
